MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: La Von Granger. Michael S. Rossoff, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff, Neveo Mosser and Cary Klettler, Esq. appeared for Defendant, Wayne M. Martinez. The case settled by stipulation of parties. Trial date is vacated.
